description_long: This object is a tall, cylindrical black top hat with a wide, gently curved brim. The crown is smooth and rises vertically before slightly tapering at the top, giving it a classic Victorian appearance. Below the hat, there is a large, dark metallic gear with pronounced teeth and a smaller, brass-colored gear partially embedded within it, suggesting a steampunk aesthetic. The hat appears to be made of a matte, hard material, likely felt or a similar fabric, while the gears are metallic and textured. The overall design combines traditional formal wear with industrial elements, making it visually striking and unique. No visible decorative ribbons or insignias are present on the hat itself.
description: A tall, black top hat with a wide brim, paired with large, industrial gears beneath it, evoking a steampunk style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height of the top hat and the exposed gears beneath, with the brass gear clearly visible inside the larger dark gear.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the curvature of the brim and the overlapping gears, with the brass gear partially obscured.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the hat's cylindrical crown and the flatness of the brim, with the gears appearing more compressed and less detailed.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the back of the hat and the gears, with the brass gear mostly hidden and the dark gear's teeth prominent.
attribute_brim_style: wide and flat with gentle curvature
attribute_crown_shape: tall and cylindrical with slight taper
